area: Task import lifecycle / low-level create drift
finding: Creating a placeholder task with `tasks create` before authoring the real markdown plan leaves a ledger entry with a different source hash; `tasks import --write` then refuses with `ATM_TASKS_IMPORT_DRIFT`, while `--force` is protected by `ATM_EMERGENCY_LANE_APPROVAL_REQUIRED`. This traps a normal operator between an unclaimable planned task and an emergency-only overwrite.
expectedBehavior: A low-level placeholder task should be upgradable through a normal governed import/open lane when no active claim exists, or the create path should emit the exact next command and warn that later markdown import will require emergency overwrite.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed 2026-07-14: `isCreatePlaceholderLedger()` allows normal import overwrite when no active claim. Regression in `import-orchestrator.spec.ts`.
followUp: Keep emergency `--force` for active-claim overwrites only.
